typography.instructions: Import Poppins from Google Fonts in index.html: <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">. Apply to the entire document body.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-800

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 inside cards. Use gap-8 for grids.

grids.homepage_categories: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4 or gap-6

spacing_and_layout.card_style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden

components.header: Sticky header (z-50) with glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200. Contains Logo, Nav Links, Login CTA.
components.footer: Generous padding (py-16), bg-slate-900 text-slate-300, links in Poppins.
components.umkm_card: Card UI with top image (max-h-48 object-cover). Badges positioned absolute top-3 left-3 (Badge: bg-orange-500 text-white font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs uppercase). Rating displayed with Lucide Star icon (fill-amber-500 text-amber-500) and number. Title, Category, and short description below image.
components.sidebar_filter: Sticky on desktop. Clean list of categories (Kuliner, Fashion, Handmade, Jasa Event, Jasa Otomotif) with hover state (bg-green-50 text-green-700 rounded-lg).
components.search_bar: Prominent real-time search input with a search icon. Use Shadcn Input with rounded-full or rounded-xl.
components.pagination: Clean numbered pagination at the bottom of the listing page. Active page uses bg-green-600 text-white.
components.admin_dashboard: Sidebar for navigation. Data table for UMKMs. Dialog/Modal for 'Tambah UMKM' form.
components.buttons: Rounded-xl or rounded-lg. Primary uses bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white. Transition transform hover:-translate-y-0.5

hero_background.description: Vibrant Indonesian market background for Homepage Hero. Add a bg-black/40 overlay to ensure text readability.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind CSS classes matching the specified color palette (Green-600 as primary).
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Use Shadcn UI components heavily: Card, Button, Input, Select, Dialog (for adding UMKM), Table, Pagination, Badge.
In the Admin Dashboard 'Kelola UMKM' section, the image input should be a text field allowing the admin to paste Google Drive image URLs. Display these URLs directly in the UMKM cards.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements for testing (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='search-input').
For the MVP demo data, use the category placeholder URLs provided in the media section for initial UMKM entries.
Implement real-time search and sidebar category filtering on the UMKM listing page.
Ensure badges (Viral, Best Seller, Termurah) are distinct orange labels overlaying the top of the UMKM card images.
